problem id: 88ca8c4a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  10000111 -> 00000001
  00111011 -> 00000110
  01100010 -> 00000000
  01101010 -> 00010000
  00001001 -> 00000010
  01110100 -> 00001000
  10111111 -> 00101111
  01010101 -> 10000000
  01011010 -> 00010100

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 00001001
